name: Double Dust Tornado Twins
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>砂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>塵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ハリケーン
desc: Target any number of Set cards in your Spell & Trap Zone; return this card to the hand, along with as many of those Set cards as possible (min. 1), then you can Set Spells/Traps from your hand equal to the number of cards returned to your hand by this effect. You can only activate 1 "Double Dust Tornado Twins" per turn.
eff: Target any number of Set cards in your Spell & Trap Zone; return this card to the hand, along with as many of those Set cards as possible (min. 1), then you can Set Spells/Traps from your hand equal to the number of cards returned to your hand by this effect.
